name: Stock History
description: Fetch daily historical data (open, high, low, close, volume) for any stock over a date range.
exampleQuery: Show me Tesla's stock history from 01/01/2025 to 31/01/2025

sampleResponse.summary: TSLA daily history for January 2025 — 21 trading days.
insights: TSLA opened the year strong with a 3.3% gain in the first two sessions.
sampleResponse.disclaimer: This is not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
